subject: (no subject)
body:
Dearest JE,
All the terms were worked out with IGY and today they withdrew the offer.

I'm hoping to get offer letter from Arab Real Estate Company. Meeting with
CEO tomorrow.

I was unexpectedly kicked out of my current company last Thurs. They were
supposed to keep me on payroll until end of Feb, but couldn't due to severe
cashflow problems.

I'll be fine. Somehow I survived in Dubai for 11 months.

Always thinking of you and missing you,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
body_html:
Dearest JE,
All the terms were worked out with IGY and today they withdrew the offer. 
 
I'm hoping to get offer letter from Arab Real Estate Company. Meeting with CEO tomorrow. 
 
I was unexpectedly kicked out of my current company last Thurs. They were supposed to keep me on payroll until end of Feb, but couldn't due to severe cashflow problems.
 
I'll be fine. Somehow I survived in Dubai for 11 months.
 
Always thinking of you and missing you,
--
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
